← E5 Enclave

E5 Enclave Incorporated

Privacy Policy

Last updated: July 7, 2026

E5 Enclave Incorporated ("E5 Enclave", "we", "us") is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. This policy explains how we handle information collected through our website, telephone lines, and text-messaging (SMS/MMS) program.

Information we collect

When you call or text one of our phone numbers, or provide your contact information to us, we may collect your name, mobile phone number, and the contents of your messages so we can respond and provide the services or information you request.

How we use your information

We use your information solely to communicate with you — to reply to your inquiries, acknowledge messages you send us, coordinate with community members and coalition partners, and (where you have opted in) send occasional program or event updates.

Text-messaging program

By providing your mobile number or by texting one of our numbers, you consent to receive text messages from E5 Enclave Incorporated. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. Reply STOP to opt out at any time, or HELP for help. You may also email accounts@e5enclave.com or call (305) 967‑0200 for assistance.

Sharing of information

Mobile information will not be shared with third parties or affiliates for marketing or promotional purposes. No mobile information — including your phone number and your opt-in or consent — is sold, rented, or shared with third parties for their own marketing. We share information only with service providers strictly necessary to operate our messaging (such as our telecommunications provider), and only as required by law.

Opting out

Reply STOP to any message to unsubscribe; you will receive a single confirmation and no further messages unless you re-subscribe. Reply START to opt back in.

Contact us

E5 Enclave Incorporated
820 NW 64th St, Miami, FL 33150
(305) 967-0200 · accounts@e5enclave.com

Nil satis nisi optimum.
